evidence_excerpt: At the 13th month posttransplantation, she developed respiratory distress syndrome because of bronchiolitis obliterans organizing pneumonia and chronic graft-versus-host disease (GVHD) and died after a period in the ICU.

quality_of_life.functional_status_evidence_excerpt: Developed respiratory distress syndrome due to BOOP and chronic GVHD, required ICU care, and subsequently died.
quality_of_life.symptom_burden_evidence_excerpt: Long-term course complicated by chronic GVHD with bronchiolitis obliterans organizing pneumonia leading to severe respiratory distress and death.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: Successful neutrophil and platelet engraftment achieved at the 12th and 42nd day of reinfusion, respectively; patient was well with no major bleeding events early after transplant.
At the 13th month posttransplantation, developed bronchiolitis obliterans organizing pneumonia and chronic GVHD.
Developed respiratory distress syndrome in the context of BOOP and chronic GVHD.
Died after a period in the ICU, indicating hospitalization in the long-term posttransplant period.

notes_on_uncertainty: Index time approximated to the HSCT admission in September 2010. Early posttransplant functional status is not explicitly described beyond being 'well'; transfusion frequency is inconsistently reported ('infrequently' earlier vs 'often' in the conclusion). Long-term quality-of-life assessments are inferred from severe respiratory complications and ICU course leading to death.
